content.full_text:
January 6, 2005

W. Curt Ealy, Esq.
Ealy, Hemphill & Blasdel, LLP
777 East Tahquitz Canyon Way, Suite 328
Palm Springs, CA 92262

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-04-262

Dear Mr. Ealy:

This correspondence is written confirmation that you have withdrawn your December 9, 2004, request for written advice on behalf of John Wessman.

You have advised that a response under the provisions of the Political Reform Act is no longer necessary.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: C. Scott Tocher
Senior Counsel, Legal Division
